---
title: "Caroline Birley"
---

## Caroline Birley

**Dates:** (1851-1907)

### Description

author of children\'s fiction 1880-94, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1883-6)

### Biography

Her works are often commended by CMY in \'Hints on Reading\'.  She was a keen amateur geologist who bequeathed her collections to the British Museum.  [obituary <i>The Times</i> (28 February 1907) 10;  others in science journals]

She is therefore unlikely to be the Miss Birley lending CMY Salverte\'s book on names in 1864, when she would have been rather young.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 12th 1881

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
